svg.text: One engine, two front doors — Use 2 builds on Use 1, zero core changes
Use 2 — the target system: bounded context via composable concept-subgraphs
• a concept-graph = a METHOD — carried by its typed CONTRACT, not its body (the abstraction barrier)
• forge → crystallize → compose tools-from-tools (a small typed library, a large problem space)
• the graph BUILDS + TESTS the method (belief-view) | a durable engine EXECUTES the compiled translation
• sound under composition: assert-at-runtime · blame · UN-LEARN a method when its premise drifts
Use 1 — the substrate: a versionable, git-like reasoning orchestrator · standalone, no LLM
• typed-fact nodes & edges • concepts CAST facts / RETRACT in cascade (JTMS) • stabilize to a fixpoint
• providers do the effectful work (geo · a DB · your own · a generic LLM::complete)
• rollbackTo (rules included) · diffRevisions · fork / merge — belief you can version like code
a complete, tested reactive knowledge engine on its own
